options_presented.text: Deep dive into the 2017 'Attention Is All You Need' paper and Transformer architecture

outputs_written.topic: make a report on rise of LLM
outputs_written.text: The trajectory of natural language processing reveals a profound shift from theoretical frameworks to ubiquitous infrastructural deployment. While early conceptualizations of machine translation date back to seventeenth-century philosophers [1179] and mid-1930s mechanical proposals utilizing paper tape [1026, 1332], modern Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved unprecedented scale through a deceptively simple mechanism. By fundamentally optimizing for next-word prediction, contemporary LLMs

Quantitative data on the exponential growth of parameters, training data, and compute resources over time
